_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Java-based database access application programming interface (API) (e.g., Java Database Connectivity [JDBC]).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request intake, provisioning workflows, access review cycles, and deprovisioning procedures.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-003 (TF, cosine: 0.516), TF-S-009 (TF, cosine: 0.479).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.383). Shared vocabulary: [access, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [api, application, based, connectivity, database, interface] vs WIDAI-only terms [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, management, platform] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.842 (P=0.838, R=0.847). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Knowledge of Java-based database access application programming interface (API)" and "Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.525 > STS 0.383 (gap +0.143). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [access, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [access, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [api, application, based, connectivity, database, interface]. WIDAI-only: [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, management, platform].
